description: Executive/quarterly business update (QBR): KPIs, evidence, highlights, risks, decisions.

fields.name: report_eyebrow
fields.guidance: Small uppercase kicker on the title slide: report kind + period.

fields.name: report_title
fields.guidance: The deck's title. Keep under ~8 words.

fields.name: report_subtitle
fields.example: Performance against target, the drivers behind it, and the decisions we need this quarter.

fields.name: kpi_heading
fields.guidance: Headline over the four KPI cards.

fields.name: section_note
fields.example: The drivers behind the quarter — and the drags.
fields.guidance: One muted line under the divider heading.

fields.name: risks_heading
fields.example: Top risks and how we contain them

fields.name: risks
fields.example: Key-person dependency on the logistics engagement

fields.name: mitigations
fields.example: Shadow resourcing in place from October
fields.guidance: One mitigation per risk, same order.

fields.name: closing_statement
fields.example: Approve the Q4 plan: hire ahead of demand and fund the client-success recovery
fields.guidance: The single closing ask, one sentence.

fields.name: next_steps
fields.example: Two senior delivery hires approved by 31 October — Jane Mokoena
fields.guidance: 3–5 decision/next-step bullets with owners and dates.

slide_groups.name: evidence_slides
slide_groups.purpose: Evidence visuals — one chart image per slide. Omit the key (or pass []) for no visual slides at all.

fields.name: evidence_heading
fields.example: Revenue tracked above target from August
fields.guidance: Assertion headline — state the takeaway, not the chart type.

fields.name: evidence_visual
fields.guidance: PNG/JPG path for this slide's image. REQUIRED: only add an evidence entry when you HAVE the file — a slide shipped with the placeholder visual fails validation.

fields.name: evidence_caption
fields.example: Monthly revenue vs plan, $m. Source: finance close, Oct 2026.
fields.guidance: Small caption under the visual: units + source.

slide_groups.name: topic_slides
slide_groups.purpose: One topic per slide — highlights, wins, workstream updates, lowlights. Add one entry per topic; each becomes its own slide in the same design.

fields.name: topic_heading
fields.guidance: This slide's headline — one topic, stated as a message.

fields.name: topic_points
fields.example: Both flagship accounts of Acme Mining renewed multi-year
fields.guidance: 3–6 bullets for this topic; one message each.

slides.name: Title
slides.purpose: Cover — eyebrow, title, subtitle, author line.

slides.name: KPI cards
slides.purpose: The quarter at a glance: exactly four KPIs (label, value, delta).

slides.name: Section divider
slides.purpose: Dark chapter break into the narrative.

slides.name: Evidence visual
slides.purpose: Assertion headline + chart image + source caption.

slides.name: Topic bullets
slides.purpose: One message per slide, 3–6 bullets. Use one entry per topic — never cram two topics on one slide.

slides.name: Risks & mitigations
slides.purpose: Two ranked columns, one mitigation per risk.

slides.name: Closing / decisions
slides.purpose: Single closing ask + next steps with owners and dates.
